Short CV

Born in 1995, Süeda Kaya completed her Bachelor's degree in Biomedical Engineering from Fatih Sultan Mehmet Foundation University. Then, in the same year, she was accepted to Istanbul Technical University Biomedical Engineering Master's Degree. Continuing her Master, Süeda Kaya, as of August 2023, she started to work as a Research Assistant at Üsküdar University, Faculty of Engineering and Natural Sciences, Department of Software Engineering. Her main studies are focusing on Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention.
